overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny suburban neighborhood. The character traverses a sidewalk, pushes through overgrown vegetation, and stops near a road as an SUV passes by. The environment features Mediterranean-style houses, an apartment building, and lush summer vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with stone retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a stone retaining wall

entered.detail: tall stone wall running parallel to the sidewalk
two-story house with red tile roof and beige stucco walls
massive tree with thick trunk and dense canopy providing shade
paved residential street running alongside the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit residential sidewalk bordered by a stone retaining wall on the left and a large oak tree on the right. A Mediterranean-style villa with a red tile roof is visible ahead up the gentle slope.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown vegetation strip between sidewalk and apartment building

events.description: character moves from paved sidewalk into dense overgrown bushes and vegetation

agents.ego_description: pushing through thick bushes and tall grass alongside the apartment building

entered.detail: dark-colored sedan parked on the side of the road
multi-story beige apartment complex with external fire escapes
dense untrimmed hedge with purple flowering bushes
distant downtown skyscrapers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the sidewalk and pushes through dense overgrown vegetation between the road and an apartment building. A parked black sedan is visible on the left while the apartment building rises on the right, with distant city skyscrapers appearing on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy roadside verge next to urban street

events.description: dark SUV drives past on the road from left to right as character waits
character stops walking and stands still near the roadside

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy roadside, pausing to let an SUV pass, then stopping to observe the surroundings

notable_agents.action: dark SUV driving along the road from left to right, passing the character

entered.detail: tall street lamp post on the sidewalk near the apartment building
black iron fence running along the property line across the street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the bushes onto a grassy roadside verge. An SUV drives past on the road, causing the character to pause briefly. The character then continues walking along the grass before stopping near the apartment building, with the downtown skyline visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet residential sidewalk into a dense thicket of greenery that eventually opens up to a roadside view of the city skyline. It begins with the character walking along a sunlit path bordered by a stone wall and a large oak tree, heading toward a Mediterranean-style villa with a red tile roof. As the character leaves the pavement, the scene shifts into a narrow passage of overgrown vegetation squeezed between a parked black sedan and a rising apartment building. The camera then emerges from the bushes onto a grassy roadside verge just as an SUV drives past, causing a brief pause in movement. Finally, the character continues along the grass toward the apartment building while the distant downtown skyscrapers become clearly visible on the horizon.
